explanations.4: enumerate gives us both the position (i) and the value (name) from the list at the same time, so we can number each node while also getting its name.
explanations.5: The f-string creates text that looks like 'node0["First Node"]', which is the syntax Mermaid uses to define a labeled box in a flowchart.
explanations.9: Quarto is a document processor that turns special markdown blocks (the triple backticks with {mermaid}) into diagrams; 'asis' tells it to render the content as-is without modification.
